add_calendar.doc: [Calendars] Add Calendar: Create a calendar with `name`.

add_to_books.doc: [Books] Add to Books: Add `input` to books. `input` is expected to be a PDF or epub file.

add_to_gif.doc: [GIFs] Add To GIF: Add a frame to a GIF.

add_to_music.doc: Add to Music: Add music to library.

add_weather_location.doc: [Weather] Add Location to List: Add a location to Weather app.

adjust_date.doc: [Dates] Adjust Date: Adjust a date or get the start of a time period.

adjust_text_tone.doc: [Writing Tools] Adjust Text Tone: Adjust the tone of the text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools.

airdrop.doc: [AirDrop] AirDrop: Prompt the user to AirDrop `input`.

alert.doc: [Notifications] Alert: Shows an alert with text and optional title and an OK button to proceed.

alternating_case.doc: [Text Editing] Alternating Case: Capitalizes the text with alternating case.

append_note.doc: [Notes] Append Note: Append text to a note.

append_to_file.doc: [Files & Folders] Append File: Append text to a file.

ask_chat_gpt.doc: [Language Models] Ask Chat GPT: Ask Chat GPT using a prompt. Follow up will open a follow-up prompt to the model.

ask_cloud_llm.doc: [Language Models] Ask Private Cloud Compute LLM: Ask a private cloud compute LLM using a prompt. Follow up will open a follow-up prompt to the model.

ask_device_llm.doc: [Language Models] Ask On-Device LLM: Ask an On-Device LLM using a prompt. Follow up will open a follow-up prompt to the model.

ask_llm.doc: [Language Models] Ask LLM: Ask a specific LLM using a prompt. Follow up will open a follow-up prompt to the model.

calculate.doc: Calculate: Perform various calculation operations using one or two operands.

capitalize.doc: [Text Editing] Capitalize: Capitalizes the text with sentence case.

capitalize_all.doc: [Text Editing] Capitalize All: Capitalizes every word in the text.

ceil.doc: [Rounding] Round Up: Always round a number up to a specified rounding place.

choose_from_list.doc: [Lists] Choose from List: Prompts the user to choose from a list.

clear_up_next.doc: [Playback] Clear Up Next: Clear the queue.

confirm.doc: [Notifications] Confirm: Shows an alert with text and optional title. It displays an OK button to proceed, and a cancel button that stops the Shortcut.

connect_to_server.doc: [Server] Connect to Server: Connect to file server at `url`.

connected_to_charger.doc: [Battery] Connected to Charger: Determines if the device is currently connected to a charger.

content_graph.doc: [Output] Content Graph: Display input as a content graph.

convert_image.doc: [Image Editing] Convert Image: Convert image to another format, compression quality, and/or remove metadata.

convert_to_jpeg.doc: [Image Editing] Convert to JPEG: Convert image to a JPEG.

correct_spelling.doc: [Text Editing] Correct Spelling: Corrects the spelling of the provided text.

count.doc: Count: Returns a count of `type` of items in `input`.

create_folder.doc: [Files & Folders] Create Folder: Create a folder.

current_date.doc: [Dates] Current Date: Get the current date.

current_location.doc: Current Location: Get current user location.

custom_image_mask.doc: [Image Editing] Custom Image Mask: Mask an image with a custom image mask.

custom_image_overlay.doc: [Image Editing] Custom Image Overlay: Specify custom image overlay configuration.

date.doc: [Dates] Date: Create a date value from `date`. Example: October 5, 2022.

define.doc: Define: Returns the definition of the word.

delete_files.doc: [Files & Folders] Delete Files: Delete a file or multiple files.

detect_language.doc: Detect Language: Detect the language of the text in `input`.

display_sleep.doc: [Device] Display Sleep: Only puts the Mac display to sleep, device remains awake.

download_url.doc: [HTTP] Download URL: Download the contents of a URL.

edit_event.doc: [Calendars] Edit Event: Edit a detail of an event. Provide an event, a detail to modify, and a new value for that detail.

encode_audio.doc: [Audio] Encode Audio: Encode audio to a different format and/or speed.

encode_video.doc: [Video Editing] Encode Video: Encode a video to a different format, size and/or speed.

expand_url.doc: [URLs] Expand URL: Get the expanded version of a URL. For instance, returns the full URL for a short URL, or the URL which a URL immediately redirects to, etc.

extract_archive.doc: [Archives] Extract Archive: Extract files from the archive `file`.

facetime_call.doc: [Phone] FaceTime Call: Starts a FaceTime audio or video call with the contact.

file_request.doc: [HTTP] File Request: Send a `method` file request to `url` with `body` and optional `headers.

file_size.doc: [Files & Folders] File Size: Returns the size of a file.

find_conversation.doc: [Email & SMS Messaging] Find Conversation: Find SMS/iMessage conversation.

find_email.doc: [Email & SMS Messaging] Find Email: Find email.

find_message.doc: [Email & SMS Messaging] Find Message: Find SMS/iMessage message.

floor.doc: [Rounding] Round Down: Always round a number down to a specified rounding place.

form_request.doc: [HTTP] Form Request: Send a `method` request to `url` with `body` and optional `headers.

format_date.doc: [Formatting] Format Date: Format a date using a standard or custom format.

format_number.doc: [Numbers] Format Number: Format number based on decimal place.

format_time.doc: [Formatting] Format Time: Format a time using a standard or custom format.

format_timestamp.doc: [Formatting] Format Timestamp: Format a timestamp using standard formats and/or a custom date format.

generate_key_points.doc: [Writing Tools] Summarize Text Key Points: Generate a summary of key points of text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools.

generate_list.doc: [Writing Tools] Make List From Text: Generate list from text  using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools.

generate_proofread.doc: [Writing Tools] Proofread Text: Generate a proofread version of text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools.

generate_rewrite.doc: [Writing Tools] Rewrite Text: Generate a rewritten version of text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools.

generate_summary.doc: [Writing Tools] Summarize Text: Generate a summarized version of text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools.

generate_table.doc: [Writing Tools] Make Table From Text: Generate table from text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools.

get_alarms.doc: [Alarms] Get Alarms: Returns all of the alarms on the device.

get_apps.doc: Get Apps: Get list of applications.

get_article.doc: [Articles] Get Article: Get article from webpage.

get_article_detail.doc: [Articles] Get Article Detail: Get a detail about an article.

get_battery_level.doc: [Battery] Get Battery Level: Get the current level of charge of the device battery.

get_cellular_detail.doc: [Wireless] Get Cellular Detail: Get a detail of the current Cellular network.

get_clipboard.doc: [Clipboard] Get Clipboard: Get the contents of the clipboard.

get_contact_detail.doc: Get Detail of Contact: Get a detail about a contact.

get_contacts.doc: Get Contacts: Get contacts from input.

get_current_song.doc: Get Current Song: Gets the currently playing song.

get_current_url.doc: [Safari] Get Current URL: Get current URL in Safari.

get_current_weather.doc: [Weather] Get Current Weather: Get the current weather for a location.

get_dates.doc: [Dates] Get Dates: Get dates from input.

get_device_detail.doc: Get Device Detail: Get a detail about current device.

get_dictionary.doc: [Dictionaries] Get Dictionary: Get the dictionary from `input`.

get_emails.doc: [Email] Get Emails: Get emails from input.

get_emoji_name.doc: Get Name of Emoji: Detects emoji in the text and returns its name.

get_event_detail.doc: [Calendars] Get Event Detail: Get a detail of an event.

get_external_ip.doc: [IP Address] Get External IP: Get the users external IP address.

get_file.doc: [Files & Folders] Get File: Get file from a path in the Shortcuts folder.

get_file_detail.doc: [Files & Folders] Get File Detail: Get a detail about a file.

get_file_link.doc: [Files & Folders] Get File Link: Get a link for the provided file.

get_first_item.doc: [Lists] Get First Item: Get first item in a list.

get_focus_mode.doc: [Notifications] Get Focus Mode: Get the current Focus Mode.

get_gifs.doc: [Giphy] Get GIFs from Giphy: Gets a number of GIFs from Giphy for a search query.

get_halfway_point.doc: [Maps] Get Halfway Point: Get the halfway point between two locations.

get_holiday_date.doc: [Dates] Get Holiday Date: Get the date of a holiday, optionally specifically for a few past or future years.

get_image_detail.doc: [Image Editing] Get Image Detail: Get a detail about an image.

get_image_frames.doc: [GIFs] Get Image Frames: Get frames from a GIF.

get_images.doc: [Image Editing] Get Images: Detect images in input

get_keys.doc: [Dictionaries] Get Keys from Dictionary: Get only the keys from the `dictionary`.

get_last_item.doc: [Lists] Get Last Item: Get the last item in a list.

get_list_item.doc: [Lists] Get List Item: Get item from `list` at `index`. Keep in mind Shortcuts starts counting indexes at 1.

get_list_items.doc: [Lists] Get List Items: Get items from a `list` between two indexes. Keep in mind Shortcuts starts counting indexes at 1.

get_local_ip.doc: [IP Address] Get Local IP: Get the users local IP address.

get_location_detail.doc: Get Location Detail: Get a detail about a location.

get_maps_link.doc: [Maps] Get Maps Link: Get a link for a location.

get_match_group.doc: [Regular Expressions] Get Match Group: Get match group at `index` in `matches`.

get_match_groups.doc: [Regular Expressions] Get Match Groups: Get all groups in `matches`.

get_music_detail.doc: Get Music Detail: Get a detail about a song.

get_name.doc: [Items] Get Name: Get the name of an item.

get_numbers.doc: [Numbers] Get Numbers: Get numbers from input.

get_object_of_class.doc: Get Object of Class: Get the object of `class` from a variable.

get_on_screen_content.doc: Get On-Screen Content: Get the content currently on-screen.

get_orientation.doc: Get Orientation: Get the current orientation of the device.

get_parent_directory.doc: [Files & Folders] Get Parent Directory: Get the parent directory of the input directory.

get_phone_numbers.doc: [Phone] Get Phone Numbers: Get phone numbers from input.

get_playlist_songs.doc: [Playlists] Get Playlist: Gets songs from a playlist

get_random_item.doc: [Lists] Get Random Item: Get random item from list.

get_rich_text_from_html.doc: [Rich Text] Make Rich Text from HTML

get_rich_text_from_markdown.doc: [Rich Text] Get Rich Text from Markdown

get_rss.doc: [RSS] Get RSS: Get RSS feed contents at URL. Limited by number of items.

get_rss_feeds.doc: [RSS] Get RSS Feeds: Get feeds from multiple URLs.

get_shazam_detail.doc: [Shazam] Get Shazam Detail: Get a detail about a Shazam result.

get_shortcut_detail.doc: Get Shortcut Detail: Get a detail about a Shortcut.

get_shortcuts.doc: Get Shortcuts: Get all of the Shortcuts on the device.

get_text.doc: Get Text: Get text from input.

get_url_detail.doc: [URLs] Get URL Detail: Get a detail about a URL.

get_url_headers.doc: [URLs] Get URL Headers: Get the headers from a URL.

get_value.doc: [Dictionaries] Get Value from Dictionary: For constants only, otherwise `dictionary['key']` syntax should be used.

get_values.doc: [Dictionaries] Get Values from Dictionary: Get only the values from the `dictionary`.

get_wallpaper.doc: [Wallpaper] Get Wallpaper: Get current device wallpaper.

get_weather_detail.doc: [Weather] Get Weather Detail: Get a detail about a weather forecast.

get_weather_forecast.doc: [Weather] Get Weather Forecast: Get various types of weather forecast for a location.

get_web_page_detail.doc: [Safari] Get Webpage Detail: Get a detail about a provided webpage.

get_webpage_contents.doc: [Safari] Get Webpage Contents: Get contents of Webpage from Safari.

get_wifi_detail.doc: [Wireless] Get WiFi Detail: Get a detail of the current WiFi network.

hash.doc: Hash: Generate a hash of type using input.

is_charging.doc: [Battery] Is Charging: Determines if the device is currently charging.

is_online.doc: [IP Address] Is Online: Determine if the user is online. Alias for get Get External IP.

listen.doc: Dictation: Transcribes user recorded audio to text, optionally in another language.

lock_screen.doc: Lock Screen: Lock the device screen.

lowercase.doc: [Text Editing] Lowercase: Transforms the text to all lowercase.

make_archive.doc: [Archives] Make Archive: Create an archive of `files` named `name` in `format`.

make_disk_image.doc: Make Disk Image: Create a new disk image.

make_html.doc: [Rich Text] Make HTML: Make HTML from Rich Text.

make_image_from_pdf_page.doc: Make Image from PDF Page: Returns an image of the provided PDF.

make_image_from_rich_text.doc: [Image Editing] Make Image from Rich Text

make_markdown.doc: [Rich Text] Make Markdown: Make Markdown from Rich Text.

make_pdf.doc: Make PDF: Make a PDF file using the provided input.

make_sized_disk_image.doc: Make Sized Disk Image: Create a new disk image of a specific size.

make_spoken_audio.doc: Make Spoken Audio: Creates custom spoken audio from text with controls for rate and pitch.

markup.doc: [Editing] Markup: Opens document in a markup editor.

mask_image.doc: [Image Editing] Mask Image: Mask an image with another image.

match_text.doc: [Regular Expressions] Match Text: Use regular expressions to match text.

move_window.doc: [Windows] Move Window: Move a window to a defined position.

must_output.doc: [Output] Must Output: Stop and output `output`. Respond with response if there is nowhere to output.

open_file.doc: [Files & Folders] Open File: Open a file.

open_in_maps.doc: [Maps] Open in Maps: Open a location in maps.

open_note.doc: [Notes] Open Note: Open note in the Notes app.

open_url.doc: [URLs] Open URL: Open URL in default browser.

optimize_pdf.doc: Optimize PDF: Returns a compressed version of the PDF.

output.doc: [Output] Stop and Output: Stop and output `output`. Do nothing if there is nowhere to output.

output_or_clipboard.doc: [Output] Output or Copy to Clipboard: Stop and output `output`. Copy to the clipboard if there is nowhere to output.

overlay_image.doc: [Image Editing] Overlay Image: Overlay an image on top of another image.

play_later.doc: [Playback] Play Next: Add music to the end of the queue.

play_music.doc: Play Music: Set music to play with modes for shuffle and repeat.

play_next.doc: [Playback] Play Next: Add music to play next in the queue.

prepend_to_file.doc: [Files & Folders] Prepend File: Prepend text to a file.

print.doc: [Printing] Print: Print input to a printer.

quicklook.doc: [Output] Quick Look: Preview `input` in Quick Look.

random_number.doc: [Numbers] Random Number: Returns a random number between `min` and `max`.

reboot.doc: Reboot: Power off the device, then power it on again.

record_audio.doc: [Audio] Record Audio: Prompt the user to record audio.

remove_weather_location.doc: [Weather] Remove Location from List: Remove a location from the Weather app.

replace_text.doc: [Text Editing] Replace Text: Replace `find` in `subject`, optionally using a regular expression or case insensitive search.

resize_image_by_longest_edge.doc: [Image Editing] Resize Image By Longest Edge

resize_window.doc: [Windows] Resize Window: Resize a window to defined size.

rotate_media.doc: [Image Editing] Rotate Media: Rotate an image or a video

round.doc: [Rounding] Round: Rounds number to specified rounding place.

run.doc: Run Shortcut: Run Shortcut with name `shortcutName`, providing it with `input`.

run_java_script_on_webpage.doc: [Safari] Run JavaScript on Webpage: Run some custom JavaScript on the current webpage in Safari.

run_ssh_script.doc: [Server] Run SSH Script: Run an SSH script using connection details.

save_file_prompt.doc: [Files & Folders] Save File Prompt: Prompt the user to choose a location to save the file.

save_file_to_path.doc: [Files & Folders] Save File: Save contents to a file at the specified path.

save_to_dropbox.doc: Save File to Dropbox: Save a file to Dropbox. Requires user to setup Dropbox account in Shortcuts app.

save_to_dropbox_prompt.doc: Save File to Dropbox Prompt: Prompt to save a file to Dropbox. Requires user to setup Dropbox account in Shortcuts app.

search.doc: [Search] Search/Spotlight: Get results from search on iOS or iPadOS, and Spotlight on macOS.

search_giphy.doc: [Giphy] Search Giphy: Gets GIFs from Giphy for a search query.

search_passwords.doc: [Passwords] Search Passwords: Searches passwords in the Passwords app.

search_shortcuts.doc: Search Shortcuts: Search the users Shortcuts.

search_web.doc: [Safari] Search Web: Search the web using a provided search engine and query.

seek.doc: [Playback] Seek: Seek the currently playing media.

select_contact.doc: Select Contact: Prompt the user to select a contact or multiple contacts. Returns selected contact.

select_email_address.doc: [Email] Select Email Address: Prompt the user to select an email address from their contacts.

select_file.doc: [Files & Folders] Select File: Prompt the user to select one or optionally multiple files.

select_folder.doc: [Files & Folders] Select Folder: Prompt the user to select one or optionally multiple folders.

select_music.doc: Select Music: Prompt the user to select music.

select_phone_number.doc: [Phone] Select Phone Number: Prompt the user to select a phone number from their contacts.

select_photos.doc: Select Photos: Prompt the user to select from their photo library.

send_email.doc: [Email & SMS Messaging] Send Email: Send an email to a contact.

send_message.doc: [Email & SMS Messaging] Send Message: Send an SMS/iMessage to a contact.

set_airdrop_receiving.doc: [AirDrop] Set AirDrop Receiving: Set the AirDrop receiving setting.

set_background_sound.doc: Set Background Sound: Set the background sound that plays.

set_clipboard.doc: [Clipboard] Set Clipboard: Set the contents of the clipboard.

set_name.doc: [Items] Set Name: Set the name of an item.

set_text_size.doc: [Vision] Set Text Size: Sets the system text size.

set_value.doc: [Dictionaries] Set Value in Dictionary: Set the value of `key` to `value` in `dictionary`.

set_wallpaper.doc: [Wallpaper] Set Wallpaper: Sets the device wallpaper to `input`.

share.doc: Share: Prompt the user to share `input`.

show_in_calendar.doc: [Calendars] Open Event in Calendar: Show `event` in the calendar app.

show_notification.doc: [Notifications] Show Notification: Shows a custom notification message.

show_quick_note.doc: [Notes] Show Quick Note: Show quick note.

show_webpage.doc: [Safari] Show Webpage: Show webpage using Safari.

shutdown.doc: Shut Down: Power off the device.

skip_back.doc: [Playback] Skip Back: Go to the previous song.

skip_fwd.doc: [Playback] Skip Forward: Go to the next song.

sleep.doc: [Device] Sleep: Puts the Mac to sleep.

speak.doc: Speak: Speaks the provided text, optionally in another language.

split_pdf.doc: Split PDF: Splits a PDF into pages.

start_shazam.doc: [Shazam] Start Shazam: Prompt the user to play music for Shazam to recognize. Returns Shazam result.

start_timer.doc: [Timers] Start Timer: Creates a new timer.

statistic.doc: Statistic: Perform a statistical operation on `input`.

street_address.doc: [Addresses] Street Address: Create a location value with an address.

take_photo.doc: [Camera] Take Photo: Prompt the user to take one or more photos.

take_video.doc: [Camera] Take Photo: Prompt the user to start recording a video.

title_case.doc: [Text Editing] Title Case: Capitalizes the text with Title Case.

transcribe_text.doc: Transcribe Audio: Transcribes text from the provided audio.

trim_video.doc: [Video Editing] Trim Video: Prompts the user to trim the video.

trim_whitespace.doc: [Text Editing] Trim Whitespace: Trim any whitespace from the start and end of `text`.

type_of.doc: Get Type: Get the type of input.

uppercase.doc: [Text Editing] Uppercase: Transforms the text to all uppercase.

url_decode.doc: [URLs] URL Decode: Decode text from URL encoding.

url_encode.doc: [URLs] URL Encode: Encode text for a URL.

vibrate.doc: Vibrate Device: Vibrate the device. Only applies to Apple devices with the haptic engine.

wait.doc: [Control Flow] Wait: Wait a specified number of seconds.

wait_to_return.doc: [Control Flow] Wait to Return: Wait for the user to return to Shortcuts.
